title: Gravity Deep Dive — Boundary Map + LIGO Direct Analysis

part_A_gravity_map.key_finding: Gravity transitions from NONE→ORTHOGONAL→BOUNDARY→DIRECT as scale increases

GW150914_mass_budget.verdict: Lowest entropy composition in all of HUF

QNM_composition.verdict: No-hair theorem = compositional minimum entropy statement

GW170817_BNS.verdict: More channels than BBH but even more remnant-dominated

discoveries: Gravity has an ACTIVATION SCALE at ~10⁷ m — below this, compositionally silent
pp→CNO crossover = point of maximum gravitational leverage on composition
BH mergers produce the LOWEST entropy composition in all of HUF (H=0.175)
The no-hair theorem is a COMPOSITIONAL STATEMENT: max compression → min entropy
GW phase budget (inspiral/merger/ringdown) sits near the 93% universal bound
NS-NS mergers have more output channels but even lower entropy than BBH
verdict: Gravity mapped from compositionally silent (fm) to sole composer (universe). First direct EITT analysis of gravitational wave events.
